name: Stoa
positioning: Business infrastructure for agents and the humans who make services available to them. Stoa helps MCP, x402, paid API, and agent-tool teams prepare services for real agent commerce: clear listings, supported claims, payment evidence, and outputs agents can read.

lanes.name: Builder onboarding and readiness
lanes.job: Make services easier to list, call, price, and pay for before builders ask directories, platforms, or buyer agents to use them.

lanes.name: Agent services and commerce tools
lanes.status: future direction, not a hosted production API claim
lanes.job: Turn repeated checks into agent-facing payment-evidence, policy, receipt, failure, and service-readiness tools.

best_for: MCP server maintainers preparing for directory submissions
x402 sellers who need payment-evidence review before launch
agent-tool teams that need supported claims and first-call risk checks
teams preparing services for pay.sh, pay-skills, or agent-readable service catalogs
paid API builders preparing launch pages, public docs, and agent-readable metadata
pricing_note: Public paid entry starts with the $49 MCP Listing Review; the $149 x402 Payment Evidence Checker is the specialized payment-proof check; the $299 Full Launch Review and Repair bundle combines listing review, supported-claims review, payment-risk scan, and applied asset repair. Any $19 pilot pricing is warm-lead-only and not the public price anchor.

offers.name: Free Launch Precheck
deliverables: scope question before any payment path
offers.input_needed: One public URL plus the launch, listing, or payment-evidence question you need answered.

offers.name: MCP Listing Review
offers.input_needed: Public MCP server listing, README, package metadata, or directory draft.

offers.name: x402 Payment Evidence Checker
offers.input_needed: Redacted public-safe payment evidence, route description, launch claim, and relevant logs or screenshots.

offers.name: Full Launch Review and Repair
offers.input_needed: Public launch surface plus target directory, buyer channel, or listing destination.

public_artifacts.name: Stoa Validator MCP Server Bundle
public_artifacts.purpose: Public local self-check artifact for MCP listing review and x402 payment-evidence checking.

public_artifacts.name: Launch Review Skill Package
public_artifacts.purpose: Public self-check artifacts and examples for launch review builder-onboarding workflows.

public_artifacts.name: GitHub repository
public_artifacts.purpose: Public proof and distribution artifact repository.

start.subject: Paid x402/MCP launch review request
start.message_hint: Send the public URL, which offer you want, and the launch/listing/payment-evidence question you need answered.

boundaries: Paid work is scoped before any payment path, checkout link, invoice, wallet address, or live x402 route is sent.
Public artifacts are self-check and proof materials, not a hosted production API.
Agent-facing services and microservices are a strategic direction, not a current production availability claim.
Stoa does not claim marketplace acceptance, durable ranking, production readiness, legal/compliance approval, security certification, or external buyer revenue unless direct evidence is published.
Private credentials, wallet secrets, payment signatures, and non-public email bodies should not be sent.
